title.zh: 中医养发：让头发浓密光泽的秘密
title.en: TCM Hair Care: Secrets for Thick, Glossy Hair

description.zh: 掌握中医养发的方法，从调理肝肾入手，让头发浓密光泽，告别脱发烦恼
description.en: Master TCM hair care methods, regulate liver-kidney for thick, glossy hair

zh.text: 中医认为"肾藏精，其华在发"，"肝藏血，发为血之余"。头发是肝肾功能的外在表现，想要头发浓密光泽，必须从调理肝肾入手。
头发的健康与肝肾密切相关：

items: 肾精充足则头发浓密光泽
肾精不足则头发干枯脱落
肾气虚弱则头发稀疏
肾虚早衰则白发增多
肝血充足则头发润泽
肝血不足则头发干枯
肝气郁结则头发脱落
肝火旺盛则头发油腻
肾精亏虚：先天不足或后天损耗
气血不足：营养不良
肝郁气滞：情绪压力大
湿热上蒸：头皮油腻
肾精不足：早衰表现
气血亏虚：营养不足
情志失调：压力焦虑
遗传因素：先天禀赋
黑芝麻：补肝肾，益精血，乌发
核桃：补肾健脑，养发
何首乌：补肝肾，乌发养颜
枸杞：滋补肝肾，明目养发
黑豆：补肾益精，养发
当归：补血活血，养发
熟地：补血滋阴，养发
阿胶：补血滋阴，养发
红枣：补气养血，养发
百会穴：头顶正中，促进头发生长
肾俞穴：补肾养发
太溪穴：补肾益精
三阴交：调补气血
风池穴：促进头部气血循环
用指腹从前额向后按摩头皮
用梳子梳理头发，促进血液循环
按压百会穴、风池穴
用手指轻拍头皮
每日按摩5-10分钟

zh.title: 黑芝麻养发糊
zh.instructions:
1. 黑芝麻、核桃炒香
2. 研磨成粉
3. 加入枸杞
4. 用温水调成糊状
5. 加入蜂蜜调味
6. 每日食用，补肾养发

items: 规律作息：避免熬夜伤肾
情绪调节：保持心情舒畅
适度运动：促进气血运行
饮食调理：多吃黑色食物
避免过度：节制房事，避免过度劳累
避免频繁染烫：损伤发质
温和洗发：避免刺激头皮
避免过度拉扯：防止脱发
保持头皮清洁：防止油脂堆积
避免高温吹发：损伤发质

zh.text: 温馨提示：养发需要长期坚持，不可急于求成。严重脱发建议在中医师指导下进行综合调理，配合药物治疗效果更佳。

en.text: TCM believes "Kidney stores essence, manifestation in hair" and "Liver stores blood, hair is surplus of blood." Hair is the external manifestation of liver-kidney function. For thick, glossy hair, start with regulating liver and kidney.
Hair health is closely related to liver and kidney:

items: Sufficient kidney essence gives thick, glossy hair
Kidney essence deficiency causes dry, falling hair
Weak kidney Qi causes sparse hair
Kidney deficiency premature aging increases white hair
Sufficient liver blood gives moist hair
Liver blood deficiency causes dry hair
Liver stagnation causes hair loss
Excess liver fire causes oily hair
Kidney essence deficiency: Congenital or acquired depletion
Qi-Blood deficiency: Malnutrition
Liver stagnation: Emotional stress
Damp-heat rising: Oily scalp
Kidney essence deficiency: Premature aging sign
Qi-Blood deficiency: Insufficient nutrition
Emotional imbalance: Stress and anxiety
Genetic factors: Congenital constitution
Black sesame: Tonifies liver-kidney, darkens hair
Walnut: Tonifies kidney, nourishes brain and hair
He Shou Wu: Tonifies liver-kidney, darkens hair
Goji: Nourishes liver-kidney, brightens eyes and hair
Black beans: Tonify kidney, benefit essence, nourish hair
Angelica: Tonifies blood, activates circulation, nourishes hair
Prepared Rehmannia: Tonifies blood, nourishes Yin
Donkey-hide gelatin: Tonifies blood, nourishes Yin
Red dates: Tonify Qi-Blood, nourish hair
Baihui: Top of head, promotes hair growth
Shenshu: Tonifies kidney, nourishes hair
Taixi: Tonifies kidney, benefits essence
Sanyinjiao: Regulates Qi-Blood
Fengchi: Promotes head Qi-Blood circulation
Massage scalp from forehead to back with fingertips
Comb hair to promote blood circulation
Press Baihui and Fengchi points
Lightly tap scalp with fingers
Massage 5-10 minutes daily

en.title: Black Sesame Hair Nourishing Paste
en.instructions:
1. Toast black sesame and walnut
2. Grind into powder
3. Add goji berries
4. Mix with warm water into paste
5. Add honey to taste
6. Eat daily, tonifies kidney, nourishes hair

items: Regular routine: Avoid late nights that harm kidney
Emotional balance: Stay happy and relaxed
Moderate exercise: Promotes Qi-Blood circulation
Dietary care: Eat more black-colored foods
Avoid excess: Moderate sexual activity, avoid overexertion
Avoid frequent dyeing/perming: Damages hair quality
Gentle shampooing: Avoid irritating scalp
Avoid excessive pulling: Prevent hair loss
Keep scalp clean: Prevent oil buildup
Avoid high-heat blow drying: Damages hair quality

en.text: Note: Hair care requires long-term commitment. Severe hair loss should be treated comprehensively under TCM practitioner guidance, combined with medication for best results.
